subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the All-Glorious Beauty! After the ascension of thy noble father, that illustrious personage, a prayer for forgiveness was requested [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی بعد از صعود پدر بزرگوار آنمیر جلیل مناجاتی طلب مغفرت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
